headline: Aria Systems, ServiceNow (NOW) Launch World’s First Agentic BSS for Communication Service Providers
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the most promising long-term stocks to buy according to analysts. On June 18, Aria Systems and ServiceNow partnered to launch the world’s first agentic Business Support System/BSS designed for communication services providers/CSPs. By combining ServiceNow’s CRM and workflow automation with Aria’s real-time billing and monetization technologies, the platform provides […]

headline: Jim Cramer on Paychex: “I’m Not Going to Fight the Tide”

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think ServiceNow (NOW) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), ServiceNow (NOW) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Workera Named to TIME's List of America's Top WorkTech Companies 2026
summary: Workera, the AI agent platform built to maximize human potential, today announced it has been named to TIME's inaugural list of America's Top WorkTech Companies 2026, presented by TIME and Statista Inc., the world-leading statistics portal and industry ranking provider. The list was announced on June 9, 2026, and can be viewed on TIME.com.

headline: zeb Unveils AI-Native Operating Model to Reinvent Consulting Delivery
summary: zeb today unveiled the public release of an operating methodology rebuilt from the ground up around AI as an environment rather than a tool, anchored by its proprietary system, Substrate. The launch reflects a year-long structural reorganization that reshaped how the company intakes, executes, and delivers enterprise transformation work.

headline: Engineering Executive Exchange Launches With 40 Founding Members as AI Pressure on Tech Leaders Reaches New High

headline: Cloud AI Today - AI Investment Shifts Focus to Growth Amid Scaling Challenges
summary: Akkodis' recent report highlights a shift in the landscape of AI investment, where innovation has overtaken efficiency as the primary driver, signaling a focus on growth and new business models. Despite accelerating AI adoption, CTO confidence in scaling AI has dropped significantly, hindered by challenges in integrating AI across enterprise systems. The report identifies agentic AI as a crucial trend, demanding new governance frameworks, as tasks increasingly require clarification for human...

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks on Our Buy List and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
